case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. DAVID MCPHERSON et al

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-26-2004 Continued To Aug-30-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-30-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Arnold Evje, II for Plaintiff; no appearance by defendant.
Matter proceeded as prove-up before Judge Gerald Ragan.
Court takes judicial notice of time and place set for trial.
Demetrius Madaris is sworn and testifies.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 1, a 3 Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit, is marked for identification and admitted into evicence. Plaintiff rests.
The Court enters judgment for Plaintiff, awarding restitution of the premises located at 34 Sixth Street #521, San Francisco, California, damages of $2,793.20, and costs of $148.30.
Judge: Gerald Ragan; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; Reporter: Floyd Butler (D. 622)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-30-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2004 Off Calendar
